provider_detail: build_topk_gating_softmax_module(num_experts=256,topk=8,bf16,renormalize=True); fused softmax+topk+renorm, layout VPT=16 THREADS_PER_TOKEN=16
torch.softmax(dim=1) -> torch.topk -> renorm (also the fp32 reference)
aiter.topk_gating(score_func='softmax', need_renorm forced False); top-K softmax probs renormalized in adapter to match renorm reference
torch.softmax(dim=1) -> aiter.ops.triton.topk.topk (1-/2-stage Triton top-K) -> renorm

skip_reason: no standalone fused topk-gating-softmax Triton kernel (only aiter.ops.triton.topk, exposed as aiter_triton)
aiter MoE-topk gating is one C++/HIP kernel (use aiter); no separately-selectable CK topk-gating from Python
aiter ASM topk paths (moe_fused_gate/biased_grouped_topk_hip) are grouped/biased routing, not plain softmax topk-gating-softmax
no standalone CK topk-gating-softmax adapter (CK topk is reached via aiter)
no Gluon topk-gating-softmax kernel
hipBLASLt is a GEMM library (no topk-gating-softmax op)
